data.name: 透明人間人妻中出
data.detailed_description:
喝下這瓶藥劑，就能變成透明人~誰也看不見
一向對已婚女人好色的主人公，突然變成了隱形人！ ！以透明人的身份介入人妻和丈夫們的生活空間，在各種奇怪的地方把人妻幹到壞掉吧 !

變成「隱形人」，你第一件事竟是去社保人妻？！
文本騷到爆炸！隱形玩法也是更加神奇
H場景很多，畫風社保，絕對值得嘗試！


特點:
  • 從原裝日本VN本地化。
  • 后宮帶有日文語音。
  • 高清16:9和4:3圖質。
  • 多小時的內容。
  • 帶有音樂和音效。
  • 帶有角色動態。
  • 帶有收藏展覽。
  • 13個與人妻H的劇情。

「透明人間人妻中出」是一個英文本地化的VN，由著名日本製作室 Norn/Miel所創作。我們在cherry kiss櫻桃社試圖將日本遊戲帶到全世界。

**注意**
所有角色的描述和圖片都屬成人並沒有任何未成年人物用於這遊戲裡。

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 / 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: ２ GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX-compatible sound

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OSX 10.6+
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: ２ GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

data.name: Invisible Cock: They never saw it cumming!
data.detailed_description:
Isn't it a shame that there are all these hot unsatisfied wives surrounding you with their sinfully sexy bodies going unloved by their impotent husbands? That's where you come in!

Go anywhere and fuck anyone, like the delightful Misuzu a cute and voluptuous wife-next-door, Anna the sexy trophy wife of some business executive, Kaori the fit and juicy bride of a slob, and Ritsuko who may be bossy but her body is undeniably hot!

These unsatisfied ladies (as well as many others) will be craving that big invisible sausage before too long. So bottoms up, chug that potion, and get busy breeding!


  • Translated version of the original Japanese Visual Novel
  • Every wife is fully voiced with original Japanese dialogue
  • Original artwork HD upscaled with 16:9 and 4:3 variants
  • Hours of story content
  • Audio including music and special effects
  • Enhanced with character sprite animations
  • Gallery and Scene selections
  • 13 scenes of sexual satisfaction for these poor horny housewives!

Invisible Cock: They never saw it cumming! Is the English localization of a Visual Novel originally created by prolific Japanese developer Miel. We at Cherry Kiss aim to provide an authentic Japanese Visual Novel experience to gamers outside of Japan.

** PLEASE NOTE **
All characters described and visually represented in this game are over 18 years of age, and no actual, nor identifiable minor was used in the production of this game.
